heading: Authority
label: 41105A Authority
text: Nothing in section 41105, as amended by the Federal Maritime Commission Authorization Act of 2017, shall be construed to limit the authority of the Department of Justice regarding antitrust matters.
notes: References in TextSection 41105, as amended by the Federal Maritime Commission Authorization Act of 2017, referred to in text, is as amended by title VII of .section 41105 of this titlePub. L. 115–282
